falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above $50,000 (key resistance level) on 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Contradicts the bottom pattern assumption by confirming bullish momentum instead of consolidation

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to >200% of 90-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Excessive buying pressure would invalidate the 'hold' signal by indicating clear trend continuation

falsification_conditions.condition: Non-Farm Payrolls report shows >300k jobs added (vs forecast 180k)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Strong economic data would negate the bottom pattern by triggering immediate bullish breakout

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
